zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Stafford於1216年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾卡素 邱奇時，他的父親Hervey de Stafford II38歲，母親Petronell de Ferrers42歲。他於1242年7月2日與Alice de Corbet在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年6月4日在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Stafford于1216年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾卡素 邱奇时，他的父亲Hervey de Stafford II38岁，母亲Petronell de Ferrers42岁。他于1242年7月2日与Alice de Corbet在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年6月4日在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾維沙安 哥吉拉 沙智 煙雨 聖 勞倫斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Stafford was born in 1216, in Castle Church, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hervey de Stafford II, was 38 and his mother, Petronell de Ferrers, was 42. He married Alice de Corbet on 2 July 1242, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 4 June 1282, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Alice de Corbet le 2 juillet 1242, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1282, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Evesham Abbey, Evesham, Wychavon Distric: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 로렌스
ko.Stafford Castle, Stafford, Staffordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 채드
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Stafford(이)가 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 카스틀 처르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey de Stafford II(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Petronell de Ferrers(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1242년 7월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice de Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 6월 4일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤 앨 세인츠 위스 스트 로렌스에 묻혔다.

ru.Evesham Abbey, Evesham, Wychavon Distric: эвешам алл сеинц вит ст ларенс, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Stafford Castle, Stafford, Staffordshire: стаффорд ст чэд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Stafford родился в 1216 г. в местности кастл чурч, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hervey de Stafford II было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Petronell de Ferrers, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Corbet 2 июля 1242 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 4 июня 1282 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности эвешам алл сеинц вит ст ларенс, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Stafford nació en 1216, en Castle Church, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hervey de Stafford II, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Petronell de Ferrers, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Alice de Corbet el 2 de julio de 1242, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1282, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Evesham All Saints with St Lawrence, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
